evidence.accuracy: Golden set exists but only 80 examples.
evidence.effectiveness: No recent A/B run after prompt and model changes.
evidence.responsiveness: P95 is monitored, P99 alerting missing.
evidence.cost_effectiveness: Cost dashboard exists but ROI margin is not tracked.
evidence.efficiency: Prompt updates and evals are partly automated.
evidence.resilience: Update pipeline success around 84% per quarter.
evidence.adaptability: Manual process for KB refresh exists, no automation.
evidence.monitoring: Operational metrics tracked, no continuous quality eval loop.
evidence.maintainability: Prompts and code versioned, change rationale inconsistent.
evidence.modularity: Retrieval and post-processing are partially decoupled.
evidence.operability: Rollback available but no canary process.
evidence.discoverability: Registry entry exists but metadata is incomplete.
evidence.readability: Prompt style guide followed by most teams.
evidence.traceability: Prompt versions logged, full lineage not captured.
evidence.understandability: Partial docs available, runbook not complete.
evidence.explainability: Confidence shown internally, no user-facing citations.
evidence.fairness: Risks documented, no segmented eval report yet.
evidence.standards_compliance: Applicable standards mapped and controls documented.
evidence.vulnerability: Baseline controls in place, no recent red-team exercise.
